name: Sweyn
description: Danish king who managed to conquer almost the entirety of England and Wales, all the while keeping control of his more northern kingdoms. Father of [Canute](https://anilist.co/character/17438). ~!After being provoked by Sweyn, [Askeladd](https://anilist.co/character/13020) executes the king by cutting off his head with a sword.!~
